header.title: Steam Price Calculator
header.subtitle: Paste a Steam store URL or app id. We compare buying the game via a gifting service against acquiring Steam Wallet by selling TF2 keys on the Steam Market.

game.title: 1. Steam game
game.hint: Paste a Steam store URL, app id, or search by game name.
game.invalid: Couldn't find an app id in that input.
game.noResults: No matches on Steam for that search.
game.invalidUrl: That URL or app id doesn't point to a Steam game.

summary.title: 2. Game
summary.empty: Paste a Steam URL above to begin.
summary.noRegionPrice: {name} — no VN price available (maybe region-locked or unreleased).
summary.selectVersion: Pick an edition or DLC in the Editions card to see a price.

key.title: 3. TF2 key (Steam Market)
key.description: Live price for "Mann Co. Supply Crate Key".

versions.title: 4. Editions
versions.description: Pick one or more editions or DLC. Their prices add up in the comparison.
versions.noAlternatives: This game has no extra editions or DLC.
versions.idle: Fetch a game above to list its editions and DLC.

params.title: 5. Parameters
params.description: Tweak the marketplace fee, the cash price you pay per key, and the gifting-service rate.
params.feeHint: Default 13. Steam typically takes 13–20% on TF2 keys.
params.keyBuyHint: Default 46,000. What a VN trader charges in cash per TF2 key.
params.giftRateHint: Typically 0.7–0.8. 0.80 means the service charges 80% of Steam VN price.
params.usdRateHint: Only used when the USD toggle is on.

comparison.title: 6. Comparison
comparison.subtitle: Game price on Steam VN: {value}
comparison.savingsVsDirect: Cheapest: {method} — you save {amount} vs paying full Steam VN price.
comparison.loss: Cheapest: {method}, but it still costs {amount} more than buying directly on Steam VN.
comparison.evenWithDirect: Cheapest: {method} — same price as buying directly on Steam VN.
